name: Caramel Apple Upside Down Cake
recipeIngredient: 5 Large Apples, peeled, cored and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a Springform pan with butter.
2. Wrap the outside of the pan with foil.
3. Evenly spread 3/4 cup brown sugar on the bottom of the pan.
4. Press the brown sugar down and sprinkle 2 teaspoons cinnamon over it.
5. Cut the softened butter into bits and scatter them over the sugar.
6. Arrange the apple slices in the pan, overlapping as needed.
7. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and remaining 1 teaspoon cinnamon.
8. Set aside.
9. In a large bowl, cream together 2/3 cup sugar and 1/2 cup butter until light and fluffy.
10. Add the egg, beating well to incorporate.
11. Stir in the buttermilk and vanilla.
12. Mix in the sifted ingredients until smooth.
13. Carefully spread the batter over the apples.
14. Place the pan on a baking sheet and bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
15. Allow the cake to cool for 5 minutes before removing the ring.
16. Invert the pan onto a serving plate, leaving the bottom of the pan in place for an additional 10 minutes.
17. Remove the bottom of the pan and serve the cake warm with whipped cream and additional cinnamon sprinkled on top.
18. The cake can be made up to one day in advance and kept at room temperature. Reheat at 200°F if needed.
